title: dysoxylum pallens
intro: Dysoxylum pallens is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as aid in wound healing and skin infections. Dysoxylum pallens can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, or ointments, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
